body.title: Sweep generated docs + feedback files for avoidance-frame language; reframe
body.result: 5-category sweep. Pass-1/Pass-2 area docs clean. audit_checks.json: 3 descriptions reframed. SKILL.md Hard rules: 11 files (sprint, sprint-batch, review, decided, fixit, context-load, commit, day-close, day-close-audit, deep-audit, design). feedback_no_* memory files: 4 renamed+reframed + MEMORY.md index. Metric +17 reviewed +17 reframed (cumulative 33/25/1). Commit 3e8e31fe.
body.description:
Avoidance-frame language in generated and hand-written docs keeps pulling future sessions off-course — the 5-10 ticket cap in AGGREGATE.md (corrected 2026-04-21) is the canonical example. These docs become context on session-start.

**Sweep targets:**
1. Pass-2 area docs (`lab/design_docs/audit_2026/pass2_output/area_*.md`) — check for prohibition-shaped language, caps, 'must avoid' patterns. Annotate or reframe inline.
2. Pass-1 output (`lab/design_docs/audit_2026/pass1_output/`) — same.
3. `audit_checks.json` — entries like 'no-sqlite-imports' reframe to 'db_proxy for all DB access' where possible.
4. Skills' 'Hard rules' sections — reframe proscriptive hard rules to approach targets (docs-in-code: update SKILL.md alongside).
5. `feedback_no_*` memory files in `~/.claude/projects/.../memory/` — rename and reframe to approach-frame equivalents (e.g. `feedback_no_amend.md` → content rewritten as 'commits are always fresh — new commit for every change').

**Affected files:** `lab/design_docs/audit_2026/pass2_output/area_*.md`, `lab/design_docs/audit_2026/pass1_output/`, `lab/claudecode/audit_checks.json`, `lab/claudecode/cc_skills/*/SKILL.md` (Hard rules sections), `~/.claude/projects/.../memory/feedback_no_*.md`.

**Design rules:** no-sqlite (no persistence); docs-in-code (SKILL.md hard-rules are load-bearing — update alongside); no-new-memory-schemas (n/a); test-plan-or-why-not — see below.

**Scope boundary:**
- In: listed sweep targets. Reframe or annotate. No deletion without replacement.
- Out: palace rule nodes (T-audit-cc-rules-approach-frame). Out: Igor's memory corpus (T-igor-self-audit-approach-frame).

**Gate:** T-palace-approach-frame-rule (need the criterion before sweeping).

**Test plan:** no new tests. Verification: grep audit_checks.json for entries starting 'no-'/'avoid-'/'never-' — each either reframed or has keep-proscriptive rationale noted. Skills hard-rules: manual read confirms approach framing. feedback_no_* files: all renamed/reframed.
